title: More dimensions!!!
description: This mod adds more dimensions to your game
body:
More dimensions!!! is an mod that adds more 2 (futurally 6) dimensions to your game. The mod is still under development, so it may have bugs. stay tuned for updates ( https://www.instagram.com/o_yoshi1014/ ). Soon we will improve the dimensions, fix bugs, and add more dimensions. the game actually have 2 dimensions, the emerald dimension and the zombie dimension(this last one will have more updates). (1.21.9-1.21.11 have chance to crash)
pls donate to me on ko-fi
